caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap and a dark green t-shirt with the white text "ION NEVER DO SHIT AT WORK" speaks into a professional black microphone. He is positioned in a room filled with framed photographs on the wall and a white mannequin wearing a white garment in the background. To his right, clothing racks are visible. The man gestures with his right hand as he talks, moving it from a raised position in the initial frames to a slightly lower, open-palm gesture. He wears black over-ear headphones. On the bottom left and right corners of the scene, there are graphic logos; the right logo includes the text "REALLY TOT". Across the sequence, the man's facial expression and hand positioning shift slightly as he continues speaking, while the background and camera angle remain stationary.
